Errors and Fixes:\n\n- **type: report not in vault-validator's valid type list:** All 4 log files used `type: report` which the validator rejected. Fixed using `sed -i 's/^type: report/type: log/'` across all 4 files. Also updated Constitution's valid types list which was missing 10 types.\n\n- **Templates/Skill.md missing last_updated:** Vault-validator requires `last_updated` field. Added `last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD`. First attempt used `\"{{today}}\"` but validator enforced YYYY-MM-DD format even on template placeholders. Fixed to use literal `YYYY-MM-DD` (matching how other templates like ADR.md handle it).\n\n- **PowerShell syntax in Bash tool for memory deletion:** Used PowerShell `$toDelete = @(...)` syntax in the Bash tool which runs bash, not PowerShell. Got \"command not found\" error. Rewrote as bash `for f in ... do rm -f; done` loop which succeeded.\n\n- **git mv Templates/ failing:** After `git mv Templates/Skill.md Vault/Templates/Skill.md` succeeded, subsequent command chain tried to `git rm -r Templates/` but failed because the directory was already empty/removed. Handled by using `rmdir` instead.\n\n- **Vault/Templates/Skill.md validator failure after move:** Missing `last_updated` field. Required two attempts: first added `\"{{today}}\"` (rejected — format validation), then changed to `YYYY-MM-DD` (accepted).\n\n---\n\n5. Problem Solving:\n\n- **Identifying the valid type enum mismatch:** The Constitution listed 12 valid types; the validator enforced 20. Found by running vault-validator and seeing \"Invalid type: report\" errors. Fixed both the files and the spec.\n\n- **Memory cleanup scope:** /simplify identified 6 stale entries; /efficiency found 10. The expanded list included entries not in the MEMORY.md index (phase_14_16_planning, project_claude_md_added, gitignore_cleanup, obsidian_setup) — these existed as memory files but weren't indexed.\n\n- **Root folder audit:** Identified 8 non-Constitution files in root.
